overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through rain-soaked neon-lit city streets at night. The journey progresses from industrial warehouse districts through commercial areas with convenience stores, then into dense neon commercial zones with massive digital billboards, culminating near a large circular stadium structure with prominent pink holographic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with elevated highways

agents.ego_description: navigating through rain-soaked industrial streets beneath massive concrete overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the road
large warehouse structures with minimal lighting
tall street lamps illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dark industrial warehouse district at night during heavy rain. Massive elevated highway overpasses loom overhead while street lights reflect off the wet asphalt. The area is devoid of pedestrians with only sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with convenience stores and neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in bright pink shirt crosses the road from right to left
entering commercial district with illuminated storefronts and neon signs

agents.ego_description: cruising past convenience stores while observing pedestrians crossing the rain-slicked streets

notable_agents.action: person in pink shirt crossing the road from right to left in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: 24-hour convenience store with distinctive green neon trim and bright interior
palm trees lining the street sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from industrial to commercial areas, passing a brightly lit convenience store with green neon accents. A pedestrian in pink crosses the wet road ahead. Palm trees line the streets as neon signage begins to appear on buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with digital billboards

events.description: large digital billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the street with pink and cyan light
massive circular stadium structure with pink neon lighting becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: cruising through the vibrant commercial district surrounded by glowing advertisements and neon storefronts

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying bright advertisements with pink and purple hues
massive circular building with prominent pink neon lighting and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial corridor saturated with neon light from massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The environment shifts from mundane storefronts to a cyberpunk aesthetic with pink and cyan lighting. A large circular stadium structure with distinctive pink neon accents becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium vicinity with dense commercial buildings and intersections

events.description: making a left turn around the stadium structure, changing perspective of the circular building
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks near dense commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating around the stadium structure and through busy commercial intersections with heavy neon signage

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in dense neon signs and holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: Navigating the vicinity of the massive circular stadium, making a left turn that brings the structure alongside the vehicle. The area features dense commercial buildings covered in vibrant neon signage and holographic displays. The drive continues through intersections with traffic signals in the rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked city that transforms from a desolate industrial zone into a vibrant commercial district. It begins beneath massive elevated highway overpasses in a dark warehouse district, where street lights reflect off the wet asphalt amidst sparse traffic. As the vehicle moves forward, the oppressive industrial architecture gives way to a more open urban environment. The scene then shifts toward a commercial area, passing a brightly lit convenience store with green neon accents and a pedestrian in pink crossing the road. Finally, the surroundings expand into a neon-lit street lined with palm trees and glowing signage on the surrounding buildings.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-saturated commercial corridor that culminates in a close encounter with a massive circular stadium. It begins by navigating a dense stretch of digital billboards and holographic advertisements, where the environment shifts from mundane storefronts into a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic dominated by pink and cyan lighting. As the vehicle progresses, the large circular stadium with its distinctive pink neon accents emerges in the distance, drawing the camera forward. The scene then shifts as the vehicle makes a left turn, bringing the colossal structure alongside the car while passing through rain-soaked intersections filled with glowing signage and holographic displays.
